violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Observed food employee putting on gloves without first washing his hands. Hands should be washed before putting on gloves.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Observed wiping cloth being placed on top of the bins with garbage after being used to wipe off a table. Wiping cloths should be stored in a sanitizing solution between uses or laundered. Observed food employee wiping part of a table top, then wiping a chair and then back to the table with the same cloth until the top and chairs were all wiped. Separate cloths should be used for the tops and tables unless the whole top is wiped and then the chairs, then cloth should be laundered.

Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. Bag of gravy was found thawing in a container of 116F water near the pizza prep area. Gravy was at 83F after 30-60 minutes. Discussed using cold running water in the three compartment sink for thawing food items. **Gravy was to be fully heated and any remaining will be discarded at the end of the day.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the pizza prep table was found dirty. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Ceiling tiles and vents and above the flat top grill were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. Certified food manager is no longer with the company. It has been over 2 months since the manager left. Facility must have a certified food manager with-in 90 days of the previous certified manager leaving.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the pizza prep table was found dirty during inspection. This area should be cleaned and maintained clean.
Laundered, proper handling, and storage (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
